convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Convert XML to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file and converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's default XSLT transformation without an explicit stylesheet.

generate-pdf-from-xml-using-memorystream.title: Generate PDF from XML Using MemoryStream
generate-pdf-from-xml-using-memorystream.description: Shows how to load XML from a MemoryStream, extract elements, and create a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using default settings.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF with XSLT Transformation
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.description: Demonstrates how to apply an XSLT stylesheet to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and then convert the transformed content directly to a PDF document.

validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.title: Validate XML against XSD and Generate PDF
validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.description: The example validates an XML file using an XSD schema and, if valid, creates a PDF with Aspose.Pdf that contains the extracted message element.

set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.description: Shows how to read width and height values from an XML file and apply them to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML Layout
set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an orientation attribute from an XML file and apply the landscape or portrait setting to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.title: Set Custom Page Margins per Section from XML
set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read margin definitions from an XML file and apply them to specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF via XSL‑FO
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, applying automatic pagination, and saving the result as a PDF with page numbers.

generate-pdf-table-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Table from XML Data using Aspose.Pdf
generate-pdf-table-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading tabular data from an XML file into a DataSet and creating a PDF document with a formatted table using Aspose.Pdf.

preserve-cdata-to-pdf.title: Preserve CDATA Sections from XML to PDF
preserve-cdata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML document, extract CDATA nodes, and write each block to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with monospaced formatting and automatic page breaks.

apply-custom-font-to-xml-elements.title: Apply Custom Font to Specific XML Elements in PDF
apply-custom-font-to-xml-elements.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, extracting text fragments, and applying a custom TrueType font to fragments that represent specific XML elements before saving the document.

embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf-from-xml.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document and embedding a custom TrueType font by replacing all text fragments with the specified font.

generate-pdf-from-xml-with-xsl.title: Generate PDF from XML with Optional XSL/CSS Styling
generate-pdf-from-xml-with-xsl.description: Shows how to load an XML file (optionally applying an XSL stylesheet that can incorporate CSS rules) into an Aspose.Pdf Document using XmlLoadOptions and save it as a PDF.

apply-custom-colour-scheme-xml-xsl.title: Apply Custom Color Scheme to PDF via XML and XSL
apply-custom-colour-scheme-xml-xsl.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL stylesheet to transform PDF element definitions and generate a PDF with a custom colour scheme using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-background-color-to-pdf-pag.title: Apply Custom Background Color to PDF Pages
apply-custom-background-color-to-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to load a PDF, parse an XML/HTML color string, and set each page's background color using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-footer-to-pdf-from-xml.title: Add Header and Footer to PDF Pages from XML Templates
add-header-footer-to-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading simple XML‑based header/footer templates and applying them to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including dynamic page‑number replacement.

add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Page Borders to PDF Using Graph
add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangular border around each page of a PDF by creating a Graph container and adding a Rectangle shape with custom GraphInfo settings.

add-background-images-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Images to PDF Pages from XML
add-background-images-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file that maps page numbers to image paths and applying those images as background images to the corresponding pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dynamic-headers-from-xml.title: Insert Dynamic Headers into PDF from XML per Page
insert-dynamic-headers-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read header text for each page from an XML file and apply those values as page‑specific headers in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF Pages from XML
insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading footnote definitions from an XML file and adding them as footnotes to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks in PDF Based on XML Content Length
insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, evaluate each top‑level element's text length, and insert a blank page when the length exceeds a defined threshold.

create-pdf-toc-from-xml-headings.title: Create PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
create-pdf-toc-from-xml-headings.description: Shows how to read heading elements from an XML file and generate a Table of Contents in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content and TOC features.

create-hierarchical-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Outline from XML Structure
create-hierarchical-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF and generating a nested bookmark outline that mirrors the XML element hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml.title: Create PDF Bookmarks from XML Sections
create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF and an XML file, then generating outline (bookmark) entries that navigate to specified pages using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline Hierarchy from XML Nesting
create-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF and generating a hierarchical bookmark (outline) structure that mirrors the XML element nesting, using recursion.

set-pdf-page-durations-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Transition Durations from XML
set-pdf-page-durations-from-xml.description: Loads timing values from an XML file and assigns them to PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf's Duration property, then saves the modified document.

generate-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-mode.title: Generate PDF from XML in Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
generate-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-mode.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and set the document to open in full‑screen viewer mode with optional non‑full‑screen behavior.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-from-xml.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences from XML
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, configure viewer preferences such as FitWindow and PageMode, and save the result as a PDF.

convert-xml-to-pdf-version-1-7.title: Convert XML to PDF with PDF version 1.7
convert-xml-to-pdf-version-1-7.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, converting it to a PDF with version 1.7, and optionally exporting the PDF back to XML.

encrypt-xml-derived-pdf-with-custom-perm.title: Encrypt XML‑derived PDF with Custom Permissions
encrypt-xml-derived-pdf-with-custom-perm.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, applying encryption with user and owner passwords, and setting custom permissions to disable printing and copying.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Password Protection
encrypt-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and applying AES‑256 password protection with specific permissions before saving.

sign-pdf-from-xml-with-certificate.title: Sign PDF Created from XML with Certificate
sign-pdf-from-xml-with-certificate.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, adds a signature field, and digitally signs the PDF with a PKCS#7 certificate.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-drm.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with DRM
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-drm.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and applying AES‑256 password protection with specific permissions for secure distribution.

compress-pdf-streams-using-aspose-pdf-op.title: Compress PDF Streams Using Aspose.Pdf Optimization
compress-pdf-streams-using-aspose-pdf-op.description: Demonstrates how to reduce the size of a PDF generated from XML by compressing its objects into streams using Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions.

compress-pdf-flate-after-xml-conversion.title: Compress PDF with Flate after XML Conversion
compress-pdf-flate-after-xml-conversion.description: Loads a PDF represented as XML, applies Flate compression to object streams using Aspose.PDF optimization options, and saves the reduced‑size PDF.

compress-pdf-objects-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Objects from XML Using Aspose.Pdf Optimization
compress-pdf-objects-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document and applying object stream compression to reduce the PDF size using Aspose.Pdf optimization features.

downsample-images-from-xml.title: Downsample Images in PDF Created from XML
downsample-images-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file, generate a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and downsample high‑resolution images to reduce the PDF size using optimization options.

export-pdf-pages-to-png-with-custom-reso.title: Export PDF Pages to PNG with Custom Resolution
export-pdf-pages-to-png-with-custom-reso.description: The example creates a PDF from an XML definition, sets a desired DPI resolution, and exports each page as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

decode-base64-images-xml-to-pdf.title: Decode Base64 Images from XML and Embed into PDF
decode-base64-images-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, extracts base64‑encoded image data, decodes it, and adds each image to a new page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

render-embedded-svg-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Render Embedded SVG Elements from XML into PDF
render-embedded-svg-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to extract SVG markup embedded in an XML file, convert each SVG to PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf's SvgLoadOptions, and merge them into a single PDF document.

render-cdata-html-to-pdf.title: Render CDATA HTML as PDF using Aspose.Pdf
render-cdata-html-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading HTML stored in XML CDATA sections and converting it into formatted PDF content with Aspose.Pdf.

generate-barcode-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Generate Barcode in PDF from XML
generate-barcode-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, creating a barcode field on a page, and saving the resulting PDF.

embed-video-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Video Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-video-annotations-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read video locations from an XML file and embed each video as a RichMedia annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Audio Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file that defines audio file locations and positions, creates SoundAnnotation objects for each entry, and embeds the audio clips into the specified pages of a PDF document.

embed-3d-models-from-xml.title: Embed 3D Models as PDF Annotations from XML
embed-3d-models-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file that lists 3D model files and their placement, then embeds each model as an interactive 3D annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-javascript-actions-in-pdf-from-xml.title: Embed JavaScript Actions in PDF Generated from XML
embed-javascript-actions-in-pdf-from-xml.description: The example loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and embeds JavaScript actions such as an open‑document alert and validation logic for a text box form field.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML definition, assign XFA data to a PDF, iterate over field nodes, and set default values for form fields using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML using Aspose.Pdf
populate-pdf-form-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template with XFA form fields, reading XML data, assigning the XML to the XFA form, and saving the populated PDF.

extract-plain-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF for Indexing
extract-plain-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF generated from XML, extract its plain text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber with pure formatting, and save the result to a .txt file for indexing.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-images.title: Export PDF Pages from XML to BMP Images
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-images.description: Shows how to bind an XML file to an Aspose.Pdf Document, generate a PDF, and export each page as a separate BMP image file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-png.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Thumbnails
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-png.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set a 300 DPI resolution, and render each page to a PNG file for thumbnail creation.

generate-pdf-thumbnail-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Thumbnail from XML-derived PDF
generate-pdf-thumbnail-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to convert an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then create a PNG thumbnail of the first PDF page.

batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF
batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates iterating over a folder of XML files, loading each with Aspose.Pdf XmlLoadOptions, and saving them as separate PDF documents.

merge-multiple-xml-to-pdf-documents.title: Merge Multiple XML‑to‑PDF Documents
merge-multiple-xml-to-pdf-documents.description: Shows how to convert several XML files to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then merge the resulting PDFs into a single document.

split-pdf-into-chapters.title: Split PDF into Chapters Using Outlines
split-pdf-into-chapters.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF, reading top‑level outlines (bookmarks) to determine chapter start pages, and saving each chapter as a separate PDF file.

paginate-xml-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Paginate Large XML into Multiple PDFs with Sequential Page Numbers
paginate-xml-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading a large XML file as a PDF, splitting it into smaller PDF files of a fixed page count, and adding global sequential page‑number stamps to each page.

repeat-table-header-on-each-pdf-page.title: Repeat Table Header Row on Each PDF Page
repeat-table-header-on-each-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a table with a header row that repeats on every page when the table spans multiple PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then validates the PDF against PDF/A-2b standards and writes a validation log.

extract-pdf-xml-representation.title: Extract PDF Internal XML Representation
extract-pdf-xml-representation.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save its internal XML representation to a file.

convert-xml-to-html-preview.title: Convert XML to PDF and Save as HTML Preview
convert-xml-to-html-preview.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and converting the PDF to an HTML file for web preview.

xml-to-pdf-validation-with-logging.title: Convert XML to PDF and Validate PDF/A‑1B with Detailed Logging
xml-to-pdf-validation-with-logging.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, validating the result against PDF/A‑1B, and recording step‑by‑step processing and error information to log files.

handle-xslfo-parsing-errors-during-pdf-g.title: Handle XSL‑FO Parsing Errors During PDF Generation
handle-xslfo-parsing-errors-during-pdf-g.description: Demonstrates configuring Aspose.Pdf to gracefully handle XSL‑FO parsing warnings and errors with a custom IWarningCallback, providing user‑friendly messages while generating a PDF.

thread-safe-xml-to-pdf-conversion.title: Thread‑Safe XML to PDF Conversion Using Parallel Processing
thread-safe-xml-to-pdf-conversion.description: Demonstrates converting multiple XML files to PDF concurrently with Aspose.Pdf, using XmlLoadOptions and Document inside a Parallel.ForEach loop to ensure thread safety.

register-pdfoutputgenerator-di.title: Register PdfOutputGenerator in Dependency Injection Container
register-pdfoutputgenerator-di.description: Shows how to add Aspose.Pdf's PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton service in an IServiceCollection and resolve it using a minimal service provider.

xml-to-pdf-conversion-with-xslt-tests.title: XML to PDF Conversion with XSLT Unit Tests
xml-to-pdf-conversion-with-xslt-tests.description: Demonstrates converting XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with and without XSLT transformations, including passing XSLT parameters, wrapped in NUnit-style unit tests.

profile-batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion.title: Profile Batch XML to PDF Conversion with Aspose.Pdf
profile-batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion.description: The program measures load, save, total execution time and memory usage for converting multiple XML files to PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then prints summary statistics for the batch.

generate-pdf-with-retry-logic.title: Generate PDF with Retry Logic for Transient Errors
generate-pdf-with-retry-logic.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while handling transient I/O and PDF exceptions with configurable retry logic.

generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-with-optional-x.title: Generate PDF from XSL‑FO with optional XSLT
generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-with-optional-x.description: The example reads XSL‑FO and optional XSLT file paths from a simple key‑value configuration file, creates XslFoLoadOptions, loads the XSL‑FO document with Aspose.Pdf, and saves it as a PDF.

convert-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.title: Convert XML with Multiple Namespaces to PDF using XSLT
convert-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSLT stylesheet that defines multiple namespaces and converting it directly to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-from-xml-custom-page-size.title: Generate PDF from XML with Custom Page Size
generate-pdf-from-xml-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to load an XML file using Aspose.Pdf, apply a custom page size based on processing instructions, and save the result as a PDF.

generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-and-xml.title: Generate PDF from XSL‑FO and XML with Aspose.Pdf
generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-and-xml.description: Shows how to create a PDF directly from an XSL‑FO file and how to bind XML data with an XSL‑FO stylesheet using Aspose.Pdf's Document class.

apply-section-based-page-margins.title: Apply Section-Based Page Margins from XML
apply-section-based-page-margins.description: Demonstrates how to read margin definitions from an XML file and apply different page margins to sections of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with AES‑256
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-aes256.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applies AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, and saves the protected PDF.
